utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each item is fully specified with appropriate details: the property has a name, type, location, price, and features; financing lists methods, terms, and cash option; legal_services include provider, address, cost, and services; moving_services include provider, costs, storage, special handling, and timeline; setup_services include detailed utilities with providers, setup fees, monthly costs, and totals; total_budget includes a complete cost breakdown. Therefore, all 6 out of 6 items are covered and fully specified.
